threat_actors.name: APT40 (Leviathan)
threat_actors.relevance: Directly targeted Australian organisations. Subject of joint ASD advisory (2024).

threat_actors.name: APT31 (Zirconium)
threat_actors.relevance: Targeted Australian Parliament (2019). Active against Five Eyes nations.

threat_actors.name: Mustang Panda (Bronze President)
threat_actors.relevance: Active in Southeast Asia and Oceania. PlugX malware campaigns targeting APAC.

threat_actors.name: Volt Typhoon
threat_actors.relevance: Living-off-the-land techniques against Western critical infrastructure. Five Eyes joint advisory.

threat_actors.name: Salt Typhoon
threat_actors.relevance: Compromised major telecommunications providers. Potential APAC impact.

threat_actors.name: Flax Typhoon
threat_actors.relevance: Botnet operations using compromised IoT. Disrupted by FBI (2024).

threat_actors.name: Kimsuky (Velvet Chollima)
threat_actors.relevance: Targets APAC policy researchers and diplomats. Credential harvesting campaigns.

threat_actors.name: Lazarus Group
threat_actors.relevance: Major cryptocurrency theft operations. Active against APAC financial institutions.

threat_actors.name: APT28 (Fancy Bear)
threat_actors.relevance: Global operations affecting Five Eyes partners. Active disinformation campaigns.

threat_actors.name: APT29 (Cozy Bear)
threat_actors.relevance: SolarWinds supply chain attack. Persistent targeting of Western government networks.

threat_actors.name: Sandworm (Voodoo Bear)
threat_actors.relevance: Destructive attacks on critical infrastructure. NotPetya, Industroyer operations.

threat_actors.name: SideWinder
threat_actors.relevance: Active in APAC region targeting government and military entities.

au_cyber_policy.name: Security of Critical Infrastructure Act 2018 (SOCI)
au_cyber_policy.key_requirements: Risk management programs, incident reporting (12/72hr), government assistance measures

au_cyber_policy.name: Australian Cyber Security Strategy 2023-2030
au_cyber_policy.key_requirements: Six shields framework, cyber resilience across economy

au_cyber_policy.name: Privacy Act 1988 (NDB Scheme)
au_cyber_policy.key_requirements: Mandatory notification of eligible data breaches to OAIC and affected individuals

au_cyber_policy.name: Essential Eight Maturity Model
au_cyber_policy.key_requirements: Eight mitigation strategies across three maturity levels

au_cyber_policy.name: Cyber Security Act 2024
au_cyber_policy.scope: Ransomware reporting, smart device security, Cyber Incident Review Board
au_cyber_policy.key_requirements: Mandatory ransomware payment reporting, security standards for IoT devices

au_cyber_policy.name: AUKUS Pillar II
au_cyber_policy.key_requirements: Advanced cyber capabilities, AI, quantum technology sharing

news.title: ASPI: Australia's cyber deterrence posture needs strengthening
news.summary: Analysis of Australia's cyber deterrence capabilities in the context of rising APAC tensions.

news.title: Salt Typhoon compromise of Australian telco confirmed
news.summary: Australian telecommunications provider confirms breach linked to Salt Typhoon campaign.

news.title: ASPI: AUKUS Pillar II cyber cooperation accelerating
news.summary: Progress update on trilateral cyber capability development under AUKUS framework.

news.title: Critical infrastructure ransomware attacks surge across APAC
news.summary: Ransomware attacks targeting critical infrastructure in the Asia-Pacific region increased 40% in Q1 2026.

news.title: ASPI: China's offensive cyber capabilities assessment 2026
news.summary: Comprehensive assessment of PRC cyber operations capabilities and strategic intent.

news.title: North Korean crypto theft funds ballistic missile programme
news.summary: Analysis of how Lazarus Group cryptocurrency operations fund DPRK weapons programmes.
